pr.title: RFC: A framework for deciding the n-gram question

output.summary: Eval-time n-gram cache builds hash tables from scored tokens, blends the estimates with neural logits, and leans on collisions to clear the min_count threshold.
techniques: strictly causal n-gram cache updates from scored tokens
alpha blending between cache probabilities and neural logits
dense hashing so collisions push counts over the min_count cliff
